mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_recommendations (user_id, resource_type, title, url, description, source, relevance_score, recommendation_date, is_clicked) VALUES (#{userId}, #{resourceType}, #{title}, #{url}, #{description}, #{source}, #{relevanceScore}, #{recommendationDate}, #{isClicked})

INSERT INTO user_recommendations (user_id, resource_type, title, url, description, source, relevance_score, recommendation_date, is_clicked) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.resourceType}, #{item.title}, #{item.url}, #{item.description}, #{item.source}, #{item.relevanceScore}, #{item.recommendationDate}, #{item.isClicked})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_recommendations SET is_clicked = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
